_publications._publicationTitle: Molecular profiling of malignant peripheral nerve sheath tumors associated with neurofibromatosis type 1, based on large-scale real-time RT-PCR.

_contextSnippet: MKI67 (AUC-ROC, 1.000), BIRC5/Survivin (AUC-ROC, 0.984), and SPP1/Osteopontin (AUC-ROC, 0.984)...ITGB4 (AUC-ROC, 1.000), CMA1/Chymase 1 (AUC-ROC, 1.000), and L1CAM (AUC-ROC, 1.000)
details: Achieved perfect discrimination (AUC-ROC = 1.000) for MKI67, ITGB4, CMA1, and L1CAM genes between MPNSTs and plexiform neurofibromas
